_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Perform analysis for target infrastructure exploitation activities.
reference_document_element_description: Monitor and analyze regulatory developments, enforcement actions, and supervisory authority guidance relevant to organizational data and AI activities, producing impact assessments and recommended responses.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-T-008 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: SP-S-008 (SP, cosine: 0.413), RM-T-002 (RM, cosine: 0.412).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 2.5/10 (raw 0.249). Shared vocabulary: [activities]. DCWF-only terms [analysis, exploitation, infrastructure, perform, target] vs WIDAI-only terms [actions, ai, analyze, assessments, authority, data] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.873 (P=0.891, R=0.855). P exceeds R by 0.037 — the DCWF element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 24 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Perform analysis for target infrastructure exploitation activities." and "Monitor and analyze regulatory developments, enforcement actions, and supervisor" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.423 > STS 0.249 (gap +0.174). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [activities] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 3.7%. Shared tokens: [activities]. DCWF-only: [analysis, exploitation, infrastructure, perform, target]. WIDAI-only: [actions, ai, analyze, assessments, authority, data].

signals.detail: Bi-encoder/STS gap 0.174 with low STS 0.249. Candidate selection was likely driven by shared vocabulary rather than functional alignment. The functionally correct KSA may not have been in the top-5 candidates.
